transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Good morning. I'm having trouble with my card — it's been refused three times this morning. I'm currently at a car rental desk and it's quite urgent.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can help with that. Your name?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: One moment, Mr. Webb. I can see there's a flag on the card. I'm going to need to transfer you to the card security team who handle these.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Transfer me? I'm standing at a counter in a foreign country.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand it's urgent. The card team will be quicker at resolving it. Can give me a reference number at least?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: They'll generate one. You're being transferred now. Thank you for your patience.

planted_violations: failed to verify customer identity before accessing account
transferred customer in urgent situation without any preliminary action to unblock card
failed to provide reference number before transfer
call ended abruptly while customer was mid-sentence
